artifact_policy: Download URLs may change over time; source_sha256 pins the retrieved source artifact and sha256 pins the committed final-format artifact.
jurisdiction_notice: Public-domain status can differ by jurisdiction. The records below retain the source edition's rights notices and identify the basis used for this preset collection.

chinese_conversion.scope: UTF-8 XML, OPF, NCX, SVG, HTML and XHTML text resources only
chinese_conversion.navigation: Rebuilt from the source edition's chapter headings; the Project Gutenberg license entry remains linked.

format_conversion.metadata_limit: Calibre imports the converted TXT and PDF titles, but reports their authors as Unknown and their languages as empty. The TXT's visible metadata header and this manifest retain those fields.

books.rights: Public domain in the USA; Project Gutenberg license and trademark notice retained.
transformations: Traditional Chinese to Simplified Chinese with OpenCC t2s

Rebuilt EPUB navigation from 120 source chapter headings

books.title: Pride and Prejudice
books.author: Jane Austen
books.rights: Text is public domain in the USA; Standard Ebooks production is dedicated to the public domain under CC0 1.0.
transformations: Converted from the pinned source EPUB to MOBI with Calibre 8.5.0
Command: ebook-convert source.epub output.mobi

books.title: Alice’s Adventures in Wonderland
books.author: Lewis Carroll
books.rights: Text and illustrations are public domain in the USA; Standard Ebooks production is dedicated to the public domain under CC0 1.0.
transformations: Converted from the pinned source EPUB to an A4 illustrated PDF with Calibre 8.5.0
Command: ebook-convert source.epub output.pdf --paper-size a4 --title "Alice’s Adventures in Wonderland" --authors "Lewis Carroll" --language en-GB

books.title: Frankenstein
books.author: Mary Shelley
books.rights: Text is public domain in the USA; Standard Ebooks production is dedicated to the public domain under CC0 1.0.
transformations: Converted from the pinned source EPUB to UTF-8 plain text with a visible metadata header using Calibre 8.5.0
Command: ebook-convert source.epub output.txt --txt-output-formatting plain --newline unix --insert-metadata --title Frankenstein --authors "Mary Shelley" --language en-GB
Normalized non-semantic indentation whitespace and trailing blank lines for a Git-stable text artifact
